ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel through which the order was placed */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit of the product ordered */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product ordered */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "ship_city" TEXT /* City where the order is to be shipped */,
  "ship_state" TEXT /* State where the order is to be shipped */,
  "ship_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code where the order is to be shipped */,
  "ship_country" TEXT /* Country where the order is to be shipped */,
  "b2b" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the order is B2B */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the customer about the order */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee handling the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer placing the order */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to place the order */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_channel FOREIGN KEY ("channel") REFERENCES channels ("channel_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sku FOREIGN KEY ("sku") REFERENCES products ("sku"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* Primary address line */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Secondary address line */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the customer account is active */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the customer */,
  "referred_by" TEXT /* ID of the customer who referred this customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "sku" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "sku_variant" TEXT /* Variant of the SKU if applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the product is active */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sales channel */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the sales channel */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the sales channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the channel was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the size is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "ship_city" TEXT /* City where the order is to be shipped */,
  "ship_state" TEXT /* State where the order is to be shipped */,
  "ship_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code where the order is to be shipped */,
  "ship_country" TEXT /* Country where the order is to be shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the shipping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the shipping record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "b2b_orders" (
  "b2b_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each B2B order */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company placing the order */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the B2B order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the B2B order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the B2B order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the B2B order */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("b2b_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_b2b_orders_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
